actions.what: Send one specific thank-you to a teammate
actions.how: Pick someone who helped you this week and message them with one concrete thing you appreciated.
actions.why: Recognition reinforces helpful behaviour and strengthens trust.

actions.what: Ask for one piece of feedback
actions.how: Choose a small task and ask one colleague what would make it 10% better.
actions.why: Micro-feedback builds a learning culture without heavy process.
